no: DavidW warns WoP may not fully work on EE. Install before SCS. FORBID: SCS component 5900 (Improved Abazigal). Recommended with Ascension.
ic: Ascension (balthazar issues, hopefully to be fixed in future releases)

conflicts.reason: Imoen Romance dialogues block ToB final
Wheels REPLACE on FINSOL01 states 0-2/4/33 does not affect Kelsey (states 16/27-32). Both use EXTEND_BOTTOM on 27-32 safely. Install Kelsey before Wheels.
conflicts.source: Wheels REPLACE only states 0-2,4,33; Kelsey modifies 16,27-32; no overlap on replaced states, 2026-03

sum: Overhauls how ToB's prophecy storyline unfolds, giving you more control over the Bhaalspawn plot. Changes the pacing and choices in Chapters 9-10.

co.no: Overhauls the ToB prophecy system with better pacing and choices.

advisories.reason: ToBR Solar component modifies itpplane.bcs without WoP detection. May interact with WoP challenge flow. Grove (cn:4) does detect WoP.

Both modify ToB endgame. WoP MUST install BEFORE Ascension — WoP detects Ascension absence and adjusts content. Balthazar redemption path and throne room flow are fragile when both installed. c7-fixwheels mod REQUIRED to fix variable bug (fin_balth_checkpoint_passed vs DMWWGroveRevealed) preventing quest completion. Ascension has FORBID_COMPONENT for setup-wheels.tp2 but path matching may not trigger in all setups.
advisories.theirComps: #0 Rewritten Final Chapter / #10 Balthazar can be redeemed
advisories.source: WoP before Ascension; c7-fixwheels handles variable bug, 2026-04
